title: 2025 Taxes
description: Submit the required tax payments to the appropriate tax authority by the deadline. Ensure all payment amounts are accurate and confirmed to avoid penalties or interest charges.
implementationNotes: Log into the tax authority's online portal, verify the calculated payment amount, and complete the payment submission. Save or print the confirmation receipt for records.
notes: Automation tools like tax software (e.g., TurboTax, QuickBooks) can auto-calculate amounts and prefill forms. Calendar integrations or reminder bots can alert you ahead of deadlines to avoid late submissions.
effortJustification: Submitting a tax payment is a straightforward task requiring minimal steps once amounts are prepared.
timeJustification: The actual submission process typically takes under 30 minutes when payment details are already known.

subTasks.title: State payment paid (online)
Federal payment paid (online)
Sign documents and return

title: Underwrite deals in email (daily block)
description: Daily 30-min block to underwrite deals sitting in email. Set a recurring calendar block.
notes: AI can pre-screen inbound deal emails, auto-populate a deal summary with key numbers (ARV, asking price, estimated repairs), and flag only the most promising leads for human review — cutting active underwriting time significantly. Tools like ChatGPT with email integration or a custom GPT can handle first-pass analysis.
implementationNotes: Set a recurring 30-minute calendar block (daily, same time) labeled 'Deal Underwriting.' Use a standard underwriting template/spreadsheet to quickly analyze each deal. Archive or respond to each email after review so the inbox stays clean.
effortJustification: A single daily 30-minute block is by definition a small, time-boxed effort.
timeJustification: The task is explicitly scoped to a 30-minute recurring block.

title: Build Google Sheet CRM for deal tracking

implementationNotes: Create a Google Sheet with tabs for: Active Deals, SubTo Follow-Ups, Closed/Dead Deals. Use data validation for deal stages, conditional formatting for follow-up dates, and Apps Script to trigger email/calendar reminders. Add a dashboard tab with COUNTIF/QUERY summaries.
effortJustification: Building a multi-tab CRM with reminders, formatting, and scripting is a moderately complex Sheet build requiring several hours of setup and testing.
timeJustification: Estimated 4–8 hours to design tabs, write Apps Script reminders, and validate the workflow end-to-end.

title: Pace audit — identify the 20% of tasks that are uniquely mine
description: Review repeated calendar tasks. Identify what to do more of, delegate, improve, or eliminate. Find the 20% that should only be mine.
notes: Strength matrix: good + enjoy (keep), good + don't enjoy (delegate), enjoy + not good (improve or delegate), not good + don't enjoy (eliminate).
implementationNotes: Export or manually review recurring calendar tasks from the past 4–8 weeks. Categorize each as: keep (uniquely mine), delegate, improve/systematize, or eliminate. Use the 80/20 principle to surface the high-leverage 20%.
effortJustification: A thorough calendar audit with honest categorization and prioritization requires focused time and reflection.
timeJustification: Reviewing weeks of calendar data and making delegation decisions typically takes 2–4 hours.

description: Run a tax review using AI. Strip sensitive PII and financial data before uploading.
notes: This is a high-value AI use case — a GPT with tax knowledge can surface missed deductions, flag inconsistencies, and suggest entity or depreciation strategies. Tools like Claude or a custom GPT with tax prompts work well here.
implementationNotes: Export or copy tax documents. Use find-and-replace or a script to redact SSNs, EINs, account numbers, and names. Upload sanitized docs to a GPT or AI tool. Prompt for deduction opportunities, red flags, entity structuring suggestions, and year-over-year anomalies.
effortJustification: PII scrubbing plus structured AI review requires careful attention but is relatively focused work.
timeJustification: Redaction and AI analysis together can typically be completed in 1–3 hours depending on document volume.

subTasks.title: Export all relevant tax documents
Redact all PII (SSN, EIN, account numbers, names)
Upload sanitized docs to AI tool
Prompt AI for deductions, red flags, and strategy suggestions
Document findings and share with CPA if needed

title: Delegate — RvP doc review follow-up (Seth & Oni)
description: Follow up with Seth and Oni on the RvP doc review.
notes: AI can draft the follow-up messages with the right tone and specificity, or set up automated reminders if integrated with your CRM or communication tool.
implementationNotes: Send a direct follow-up message to Seth and Oni with the specific doc, outstanding questions, and a clear deadline. Track responses in your task manager. Escalate or reassign if no response within the set window.
effortJustification: This is a simple delegation/follow-up task requiring only a message send and response tracking.
timeJustification: Writing and sending two follow-up messages takes under 30 minutes.

subTasks.title: Draft follow-up message to Seth re: RvP doc review
Draft follow-up message to Oni re: RvP doc review
Set a response deadline and reminder
Confirm receipt and track to completion

title: Delegate — FB/email marketing execution (VA or team)
description: Hand off FB and email marketing execution to a VA or team member. Write copy with AI first, then delegate.
notes: AI is highly applicable here: use LLMs to generate ad copy variations, email subject lines, and body content at scale. Tools like Jasper, Copy.ai, or ChatGPT can dramatically reduce copy creation time before handing off to a VA for scheduling and execution.
implementationNotes: Draft a delegation brief outlining scope (FB ads + email campaigns), tools used (e.g., Meta Ads Manager, Mailchimp/Klaviyo), access requirements, and brand guidelines. Use AI (e.g., ChatGPT) to generate initial copy drafts, then hand off to VA with a clear SOP and feedback loop.
effortJustification: Small effort because the bulk of creative work is AI-assisted; the human task is scoping, briefing, and reviewing before delegation.
timeJustification: Estimated 30–60 minutes to draft the delegation brief, generate AI copy, and hand off with clear instructions.

subTasks.title: Define scope and deliverables for VA (FB ads + email cadence)
Use AI to generate initial copy drafts (ad copy + email sequences)
Grant VA access to Meta Ads Manager and email platform
Write delegation brief / SOP with brand voice guidelines
Set up feedback and approval loop with VA

title: Develop personal tracker web app
description: Build and deploy a personal todo tracker accessible from phone and desktop. Fully shipped: rich todo fields, AI auto-fill via Claude API, sidebar filters, trash/restore, and Railway deployment with persistent volume storage.
implementationNotes: Node.js/Express backend, vanilla JS single-page frontend, JSON file storage on Railway Volume (DATA_FILE env var), Anthropic SDK for AI enrichment with batched parallel calls.
notes: In progress — built with Node.js/Express. Deploy to Railway.app.
effortJustification: Full-stack build from scratch — backend API, single-page UI, Railway deployment, AI integration, and multiple iteration cycles.
timeJustification: Multiple sessions across several days covering design, build, deploy, debugging, and feature additions.

subTasks.title: Define feature requirements and UI wireframe
Build Express API with JSON file persistence
Build single-page UI with sidebar filter layout
Deploy to Railway with persistent volume storage
Add rich todo fields (tags, effort, subtasks, deps…)
Add AI auto-fill via Claude API (batched)
Add trash can with soft-delete and restore
Add priority, effort, time, tag sidebar filters
feature - AI prioritize for next highest value todo
feature - A ranked list with reasoning ("Do X first because...")
feature - A short action plan ("This week: ..., Next week: ...")
feature - Grouped by category/theme the AI infers

title: finish dispersing watchrun money
